name: clinical_safety
description: Clinical safety logic pack for drug-drug interaction monitoring, dose range validation, transitive interaction chain detection, and polypharmacy alerting.
author: AnamDB Clinical Safety Team

rules.name: ddi_contraindication
rules.description: Flag known high-risk drug-drug interactions from a contraindication table.
rules.datalog: contraindicated(P, D1, D2) :- prescriptions(P), drug_interactions(D1, D2), P.drug_a = D1.drug_name, P.drug_b = D2.drug_name, D1.severity = 'critical'.

rules.name: dose_range_violation
rules.description: Flag doses outside the therapeutic window for a given drug.
rules.datalog: dose_violation(P) :- prescriptions(P), drug_reference(R), P.drug_name = R.drug_name, P.dose_mg > R.max_dose_mg.

rules.name: dose_underdose_violation
rules.description: Flag doses below the minimum effective therapeutic dose.
rules.datalog: underdose_violation(P) :- prescriptions(P), drug_reference(R), P.drug_name = R.drug_name, P.dose_mg < R.min_dose_mg.

rules.name: interaction_chain
rules.description: Transitive drug-drug interaction deduction: if A interacts with B and B interacts with C, flag A+C as a potential indirect interaction.
rules.datalog: indirect_interaction(A, C) :- drug_interactions(A, B), drug_interactions(B, C), A.drug_name != C.drug_name.

rules.name: polypharmacy_alert
rules.description: Flag patients currently prescribed more than 5 concurrent medications. Polypharmacy increases adverse event risk.

rules.name: renal_dosing_adjustment
rules.description: Flag medications requiring dose reduction in patients with impaired renal function (eGFR < 30).
rules.datalog: renal_adjustment(P) :- prescriptions(P), patient_labs(L), P.patient_id = L.patient_id, L.egfr < 30, P.requires_renal_adjustment = 'true'.

rules.name: allergy_contraindication
rules.description: Flag prescriptions where the patient has a documented allergy to the drug or its class.
rules.datalog: allergy_flag(P) :- prescriptions(P), patient_allergies(A), P.patient_id = A.patient_id, P.drug_class = A.allergen_class.

rules.name: pregnancy_category_x
rules.description: Flag Category X drugs prescribed to patients flagged as pregnant.
rules.datalog: pregnancy_risk(P) :- prescriptions(P), drug_reference(R), patient_status(S), P.drug_name = R.drug_name, R.pregnancy_category = 'X', P.patient_id = S.patient_id, S.is_pregnant = 'true'.

drug_interactions.description: Known drug-drug interaction pairs with severity levels.

drug_reference.description: Drug reference table with therapeutic dose ranges.

patient_allergies.description: Documented patient allergies by drug class.
